summary: Full-screen disconnect overlay, news timeout, fully automatic updates, Cognito auth fix.
release_notes: The 'Not connected' overlay now covers the entire screen (including the trading window) so it's impossible to miss. Settings remains accessible above it.
Added a 10-second timeout to news fetches — news list, article, and company info requests no longer hang indefinitely.
Auto-update is now fully automatic — updates download and install on startup with no user action required.
A slim progress bar at the top shows download progress, with an expandable 'What's new' section showing release notes.
Fixed expired download URLs — the app now fetches a fresh S3 URL right before downloading instead of reusing the one from startup.
Launcher auto-fetches Cognito config from CloudFormation in dev mode when not stamped at build time.
Fixed passwordless email login — added the missing Cognito custom auth Lambda triggers (OTP generation and verification).
